news.t: Why I'm Not Giving Up on Value Stocks
Coinbase and AMD Count as Value Stocks in Some ETFs
The S&P 500 Is a Megacap Tech Fund. Where to Invest Instead.
Value stocks have outperformed growth stocks. And now they're even better bets
Forget Value Versus Growth. Pick Quality Stocks Instead.
Value Stocks Look Poised to Shine Again

holdings.infoBox: VOOV is an equity ETF with a total of 457 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.88%, Amazon.com at 4.27%, Exxon Mobil at 2.09%, Intel at 1.85%, and Walmart at 1.74%.

overview.description: The Vanguard S&P 500 Value ETF (VOOV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Value index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap value-style securities from the committee-selected S&P 500. VOOV was launched on Sep 7, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Why I'm Not Giving Up on Value Stocks
data.text: James Glassman explains why he still has faith in investing in value stocks.

data.title: Coinbase and AMD Count as Value Stocks in Some ETFs
data.text: Value investing has been left behind as the tech-led market rally rages on. A peek at the iShares Russell 1000 Value exchange-traded fund reveals surprises.

data.title: The S&P 500 Is a Megacap Tech Fund. Where to Invest Instead.
data.text: To capture the market's full potential return, investment strategists recommend adding exposure to international markets, value stocks, and small- and mid-cap companies.

data.title: Value stocks have outperformed growth stocks. And now they're even better bets
data.text: Value stocks over the past two months have become even more compelling investments.

data.title: Forget Value Versus Growth. Pick Quality Stocks Instead.
data.text: The difference between the expected performance of value and growth stocks are more blurred than ever. Here's how to pick winning stocks.

data.title: Value Stocks Look Poised to Shine Again
data.text: Growth stocks have outperformed for most of the economic recovery, but value stocks are cheap and earnings are growing briskly.
